title: QTJH broom and mop holder put wet mops movable Commercial mop rack cleaning tool cart storage for garden garage organizer mop drain rack
features: 1、A nice large cart that holds your cleaning supplies，Keeps brooms and mops organized

2、lets you wheel them around your house without worry about bucket spilling all over your floor，When putting away damp mops and so forth it's great to have the tray underneath so nothing drips onto the floors
3、High Quality; This mop and broom holder raw materials made of clad sheet steel pipe which is rust-proof , weather proof design and can hold up to 22 lbs(10kg) of weight.
4、Easy to use,The items pull out perfectly and snap in with no problems The hook can collapse，also are great for drying towels etc
5、If you read the install introduction ,and watch video ;This assembled without any problems，Any questions, contact us!
description: Product Description Hanging on the wall without sink, the mop is prone to mold, peculiar smell and musty smell Cleaning tools are difficult to store Keeps brooms and mops organized nothing drips onto the floors casters move easily lets you wheel them around your house without worry about bucket spilling all over your floor works great it actually loaded with a real spring ,so can easily hold heavy tools with a no-slip grip easy to pull out\ snap in works great - sturdy handle ball locks The items pull out perfectly and snap in with no problems sturdy bottom tray it is very durable actually it does not tipped over
